description: Brief note / order of payment addressed to Abū l-Khayr, asking him to do something with the bearer of the note involving different textiles/garments (al-thawb, al-[...] al-Dimyāṭī, and al-maqṭaʿ). There are additional notations in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals on verso (probably the original use of the fragment, since these are torn).
